---
title: "main"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(quantreg)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
data <- read_csv("insurance.csv")
```

```{r}
data
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=age))+
        geom_boxplot()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=age, y=bmi))+
        geom_point()
```


```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=sex))+
        geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = data, aes(x = bmi)) +
  geom_histogram()
```


```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=sex))+
        geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = data, aes(x = factor(children))) +
  geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=smoker)) +
        geom_bar()
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=data, mapping=aes(x=region)) +
        geom_bar()
```



```{r}
train_index <- sample(1:nrow(data), size = 0.8 * nrow(data))
train_data <- data[train_index, ]
test_data <- data[-train_index, ]
```


```{r}
model <- rq(charges ~ . + smoker*bmi, data=train_data, tau = 0.75)
```

```{r}
summary(model)
```

```{r}
taus <- seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.1)

model <- rq(charges ~ ., data = data, tau = taus)

plot(summary(model), par='age')
```
```{r}
plot(summary(model), par='bmi')
```

```{r}
plot(summary(model), par='children')
```
```{r}
pred <- predict(model, newdata = test_data)
actual <- test_data$charges
```

```{r}
mae <- mean(abs(actual - pred))
mae
```

```{r}
rmse <- sqrt(mean((actual - pred)^2))
rmse
```

```{r}
# Quantile loss
tau <- 0.75
loss <- mean(ifelse(actual >= pred,
                    tau * (actual - pred),
                    (1 - tau) * (pred - actual)))
loss
```
